title: Sums
description: You are to write a program to compute different sums based on the given positive integer N.
input: The first line of the input includes the number of test cases, 1 ≤ t ≤ 10000. Each test case appears in one line containing 1 ≤ N ≤ 10000.
output:
For each test case, print three space separated integers S1, S2, S3 in one line where

  • S1 : the sum of first N positive integer,
  • S2 : the sum of first N positive odd integer,
  • S3 : the sum of first N positive even integer.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia West Continent, Iran, Iran Internet Programming Contest, IIPC 2015, citizen
